CustomField.description: Does this opportunity require Special Prices lower than pre-negotiated prices between PerkinElmer and your company
CustomField.inlineHelpText:
By Selecting No, you agree that you won’t be asking for lower than pre-negotiated prices on all products associated to this opportunity.
By Selecting Yes, you agree to go through the PerkinElmer approval.
CustomField.label: Need lower than pre-negotiated prices?
